headline: Broadcom vs. Marvell: A Valuation Showdown for the Custom AI Chip Trade
summary: Broadcom and Marvell are both riding the custom AI chip boom, but one offers faster growth while the other may be the better value for long-term investors.

headline: Can Meta Platforms (META) Turn Surplus AI Capacity Into a Durable Enterprise Revenue Engine?
summary: In recent weeks, Meta Platforms announced a plan to launch “Meta Compute” to rent out excess AI capacity, accelerate production of its in-house Iris data-center chip with Broadcom and TSMC from September, and roll out advanced AI models like Muse Spark 1.1 and Muse Image alongside a new chief data officer appointment. These moves signal Meta’s push to turn its vast AI infrastructure and models into an enterprise-facing cloud and tooling business, even as it balances cost efficiency gains...

headline: What’s the AI hit to U.S. inflation?
summary: Investing.com -- Artificial intelligence is adding to U.S. inflation rather than reducing it, with the current investment boom estimated to contribute roughly 0.4 percentage points to annual inflation in 2026, according to CIBC Capital Markets.
